G0.label:
case cons.cons
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head✝¹ : α
tail✝¹ : List α
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝¹ :
(map f tail✝¹ ⊆ map f tail✝ ↔ tail✝¹ ⊆ tail✝) →
(map f (head✝¹ :: tail✝¹) ⊆ map f tail✝ ↔ head✝¹ :: tail✝¹ ⊆ tail✝)
tail_ih✝ : map f tail✝¹ ⊆ map f (head✝ :: tail✝) ↔ tail✝¹ ⊆ head✝ :: tail✝
⊢ map f (head✝¹ :: tail✝¹) ⊆ map f (head✝ :: tail✝) ↔ head✝¹ :: tail✝¹ ⊆ head✝ :: tail✝

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head : α
tail : List α
head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
tail_ih :
(map f tail ⊆ map f tail_1 ↔ tail ⊆ tail_1) →
(map f (head :: tail) ⊆ map f tail_1 ↔ head :: tail ⊆ tail_1)
tail_ih_1 : map f tail ⊆ map f (head_1 :: tail_1) ↔ tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1
⊢ map f (head :: tail) ⊆ map f (head_1 :: tail_1) ↔ head :: tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1

G2.label:
case mp
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head : α
tail : List α
head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
tail_ih :
(map f tail ⊆ map f tail_1 ↔ tail ⊆ tail_1) →
tail ⊆ tail_1 → ((∃ a, a ∈ tail_1 ∧ f a = f head) ↔ head ∈ tail_1)
tail_ih_1 : map f tail ⊆ f head_1 :: map f tail_1
a : tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1
⊢ (f head = f head_1 ∨ ∃ a, a ∈ tail_1 ∧ f a = f head) → head = head_1 ∨ head ∈ tail_1

G8.label:
case mp.inl
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2

h : Injective f
head : α
tail : List α
head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
tail_ih :
(map f tail ⊆ map f tail_1 ↔ tail ⊆ tail_1) →
tail ⊆ tail_1 → ((∃ a, a ∈ tail_1 ∧ f a = f head) ↔ head ∈ tail_1)
tail_ih_1 : map f tail ⊆ f head_1 :: map f tail_1
a : tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1
h_1 : f head = f head_1
⊢ head = head_1 ∨ head ∈ tail_1

a : tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1
h_1 : f head = f head_1
fwd : head = head_1
⊢ head = head_1 ∨ head ∈ tail_1

G10.label:
case mp.inr
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head : α
tail : List α
head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
tail_ih : (map f tail ⊆ map f tail_1 ↔ tail ⊆ tail_1) → tail ⊆ tail_1 → head ∈ tail_1
tail_ih_1 : map f tail ⊆ f head_1 :: map f tail_1
a : tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1
w : α
left : w ∈ tail_1
right : f w = f head
fwd : w = head
⊢ head = head_1 ∨ head ∈ tail_1

G3.label:
case mpr
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
h : Injective f
head : α
tail : List α
head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
tail_ih :
(map f tail ⊆ map f tail_1 ↔ tail ⊆ tail_1) →
tail ⊆ tail_1 → ((∃ a, a ∈ tail_1 ∧ f a = f head) ↔ head ∈ tail_1)
tail_ih_1 : map f tail ⊆ f head_1 :: map f tail_1
a : tail ⊆ head_1 :: tail_1
⊢ head = head_1 ∨ head ∈ tail_1 → f head = f head_1 ∨ ∃ a, a ∈ tail_1 ∧ f a = f head
